notes:
Login Reliability Fix

  • Fixes the stuck loading screen for all sign-in methods (Google, Apple, Microsoft, Email, Magic Link, SSO). New accounts now finish setting up correctly and reach the lobby or onboarding screen.
  • Clear retry when account setup fails. If the server is unreachable, you now see a friendly retry screen instead of an endless spinner.
  • Better workspace defaults for Apple Hide My Email and Microsoft live.com accounts — they now correctly get a private workspace instead of a shared domain team.
